stimulus: Although hummingbirds prefer highly concentrated sugar water, the flowers that attract them have evolved to produce nectar that is only moderately sweet. A recent study ______blank why: producing concentrated nectar is biologically costly, and it is more efficient for flowers to make a large volume of less sweet nectar than a small volume of very sweet nectar.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. A main clause requires a finite verb. The finite present tense verb “clarifies” correctly serves as the main verb performing the action of the subject “a recent study.”

Choices B, C, and D are all nonfinite forms that cannot serve as the main verb of a clause.
